case_title: GARY M. DECAD VS. JAMES PATOCK

docket_entries.description: WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT RETURNED BY SHERIFF AS TO DEFENDANT PATOCK, JAMES DBA  ARCMETAL HEARING SET FOR OCT-22-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
WARRANT FORWARDED TO DEPT. 506 FOR JUDICIAL SIGNATURE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DECAD, GARY M.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-30-2012 IS CONTINUED TO JUN-07-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR JUN-07-2012; JUDGMENT DEBTOR JAMES PATOCK FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 500.00. APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF(JC) NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT(JD). JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2012; JUDGMENT DEBTOR JAMES PATOCK FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 500.00. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. DEFENDANT DID NOT SHOW UP AT TODAY HEARING ON THE BENCH WARRANT WHICH WAS ISSUED ON 6/07/12. A SECOND BENCH WARRANT WAS ISSUED AGAINST THE DEFENDANT TODAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SIGNED WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT FORWARDED TO THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DECAD, GARY M.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DECAD, GARY M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATOCK, JAMES DBA  ARCMETAL $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,085.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED, BAIL SET AT $500.00, WARRANT FORWARDED TO DEPARTMENT 506 FOR JUDICIAL SIGNATURE AS TO DEFENDANT PATOCK, JAMES DBA  ARCMETAL
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED, BAIL SET AT $500.00, WARRANT FORWARDED TO DEPT.#506 FOR JUDICIAL SIGNATURE. AS TO DEFENDANT PATOCK, JAMES DBA  ARCMETAL

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2012 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-08-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF RECEIVED A PHONE CALL FROM THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO HEARING AND FOLLOWING TERMS WERE SET BETWEEEN THE PARTIES OVER THE PHONE. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF BY CASHIER'S CHECK IN THE AMOUNT OF $2500 EVERY WEEK, PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING OF 11/8/12. IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT PAY, A BENCH WARRANT WILL BE ISSUED AT THE NEXT HEARING. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR NOV-08-2012; JUDGMENT DEBTOR JAMES PATOCK FAILED TO APPEAR. SECOND WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 1000.00. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY DECAD, GARY M. AS TO DEFENDANT PATOCK, JAMES DBA  ARCMETAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE ON BENCH WARRANT FILED BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT (PERSONAL SERVICE ON 6-28-12)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-16-2012 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-20-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO APPEAR IN RESPONSE TO THE BENCH WARRANT SERVED ON 6-28-12 BY THE SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S OFFICE.
